order  ◇→ idle
  ⟳ inventory (watchInventory)
├─ idle
│    SUBMIT → processing
├─ processing  ◇→ charging
│  └─ charging
│       ⏱ 30s [hasRetriesLeft] → retrying
│       ⏱ 30s → errored
│       ⟳ charge (chargeCard)
│         ✓ → confirming
│         ✗ → retrying [hasRetriesLeft]
│         ✗ → errored
├─ retrying
│    ⏱ RetryDelay → processing.charging
├─ confirming
│    CONFIRM → done
├─ done  ●
└─ errored  ●
